Sponsorships / BEACN

BEACN

hardware
Sponsorship and Affiliate
$25 per Commission
affiliate; sponsorship
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

BEACN is a relatively new company that makes technology solutions for streamers, podcasters, gamers, and content creators. Their flagship product is their top-tier microphone used by countless streamers and podcasters. They’re expanding their product line, which now includes an audio mixer.

BEACN Referral Program

When someone makes a purchase using your unique link, they’ll get $20 USD off their order and we’ll give you $25 USD in cashback, gift cards, or a ton of other rewards—your choice!

BEACN Sponsorship

If you browse BEACN’s contact page, you’ll see a section for sponsorships. They ask any content creators looking to get sponsored by BEACN to email partnerships@beacn.com. That’s all the info they share.

However, they shared a blog post upon launching where they share how they approach content creators and reviewers. Here’s their focus:

  • No paid reviews at launch
  • Less than 80 review & creator units in circulation
  • 25% of creators have less than 75 concurrent viewers / 10,000 YouTube subscribers
  • Prioritize marginalized creators including LGBTQIA+ and people of color It looks like BEACN wants to support both established streamers, and relatively new or up-and-coming content creators.

This is a great opportunity for any streamer with a growing audience.

FOS Affiliate Program

This sponsorship is part of our affiliate network.
